poster-headline.purpose: Large sentence-case statements in the voice, distribution, and leads scenes.

title.purpose: Product panels, interface evidence, and compact brand marks.

shadows.name: command-center-lift
shadows.purpose: The desktop hero command center only.

shadows.name: poster-offset
shadows.purpose: Large illustrated product panels on light or colored fields.

shadows.name: compact-offset
shadows.purpose: Small distribution outputs and evidence cards.

shadows.name: inverse-offset
shadows.purpose: Signal cards on the Soft Ink leads field.

motion.name: ease-relay
motion.purpose: Section reveals, card entrances, and responsive hover feedback.

motion.name: command-center-spring
motion.purpose: Symmetrical scroll-linked rise, settle, and exit for desktop product proof.

motion.name: connector-flow
motion.purpose: Dashed route flow between distribution and lead evidence.

motion.name: footer-hover
motion.purpose: Independent lift for footer letter pieces.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single dominant action on a surface.
components.html: <button class="ds-button-primary">Get started <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-button-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; min-height:48px; padding:14px 22px; border:0; border-radius:10px; background:oklch(18% 0.012 55); color:oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); font:600 15px/1.2 'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; transition:transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1),background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-button-primary:hover { transform:translateY(-1px); background:oklch(24% 0.014 55); } .ds-button-primary:active { transform:translateY(0); } .ds-button-primary:focus-visible { outline:3px solid oklch(57% 0.24 260); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Navigation Wordmark
components.description: Sparse 72px navigation anchored by the lowercase wordmark.
components.html:
content os.
ProductThe loopPricing
components.css: .ds-nav { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; min-height:72px; color:oklch(18% 0.012 55); font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-wordmark { color:inherit; text-decoration:none; font-size:20px; font-weight:700; line-height:1; letter-spacing:-0.045em; } .ds-wordmark span { color:oklch(57% 0.24 260); } .ds-nav-links { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:28px; } .ds-nav-links a { color:oklch(43% 0.014 65); text-decoration:none; font-size:14px; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color:oklch(18% 0.012 55); } .ds-nav button { min-height:44px; padding:10px 16px; border:0; border-radius:10px; background:oklch(18% 0.012 55); color:oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); } .ds-nav a:focus-visible,.ds-nav button:focus-visible { outline:3px solid oklch(57% 0.24 260); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Illustrated Command Center
components.description: The dominant product proof showing the entire content-to-conversation relay.
components.html:
This week
Signals 12Drafts 3Voice 92%Scheduled 8Replies 17
Ready to shipCreator Brain +18%Warm conversations
components.css: .ds-command-center { overflow:hidden; width:min(100%,1120px); border:1px solid oklch(18% 0.012 55 / 0.15); border-radius:22px; background:oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); color:oklch(18% 0.012 55); box-shadow:0 48px 96px -34px rgb(24 22 20 / 0.42),0 18px 38px -24px rgb(24 22 20 / 0.26); font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-command-center header { padding:24px; font-size:28px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-0.04em; } .ds-relay { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr); gap:8px; padding:16px 24px 28px; border-top:1px solid oklch(18% 0.012 55 / 0.11); } .ds-relay strong { font-size:14px; } .ds-proof { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1.2fr .6fr 1fr; gap:10px; padding:18px 24px 24px; } .ds-proof span { padding:18px; border:2px solid oklch(18% 0.012 55); border-radius:14px; font-weight:700; } .ds-proof span:nth-child(2) { background:oklch(84% 0.20 125); } .ds-proof span:nth-child(3) { background:oklch(57% 0.24 260); color:oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); }

components.name: Poster Card
components.description: A tactile product-evidence panel with an ink construction outline.
components.css: .ds-poster-card { max-width:520px; padding:20px; border:3px solid oklch(18% 0.012 55); border-radius:18px; background:oklch(100% 0 0); color:oklch(18% 0.012 55); box-shadow:14px 16px 0 oklch(18% 0.012 55); transform:rotate(1.5deg); font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-poster-card span { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; } .ds-poster-card h3 { margin:16px 0 8px; font-size:20px; letter-spacing:-0.03em; } .ds-poster-card p { margin:0; color:oklch(43% 0.014 65); } .ds-poster-card:hover { transform:translateY(-4px) rotate(0deg); } .ds-poster-card:focus-within { outline:3px solid oklch(57% 0.24 260); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Signal Card
components.description: Conversation evidence on the dark leads poster.
components.html:
✓Warm contact identified

Commented on your founder-led sales post
components.css: .ds-signal-card { min-height:166px; padding:20px; border:3px solid oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); border-radius:18px; background:oklch(76% 0.12 305); color:oklch(18% 0.012 55); box-shadow:8px 9px 0 oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; } .ds-signal-title { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; } .ds-signal-title span { display:grid; width:40px; height:40px; place-items:center; border:2px solid oklch(18% 0.012 55); border-radius:11px; background:oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); } .ds-signal-card p { margin:16px 0 0; padding-top:12px; border-top:1px solid oklch(18% 0.012 55 / 0.15); font-size:12px; line-height:1.5; } .ds-signal-card:hover { transform:translateY(-7px); } .ds-signal-card:focus-within { outline:3px solid oklch(57% 0.24 260); outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Footer Mark
components.description: Compact relay-colored letter pieces spelling content os.
components.css: .ds-footer-mark { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; gap:4px; font-family:'Hanken Grotesk',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:24px; font-weight:700; color:oklch(18% 0.012 55); } .ds-footer-mark span { display:grid; min-width:28px; height:34px; place-items:center; border:2px solid currentColor; border-radius:8px; background:oklch(99.2% 0.002 85); transition:transform 180ms cubic-bezier(0.16,1,0.3,1); } .ds-footer-mark span:nth-child(2),.ds-footer-mark span:nth-child(9) { background:oklch(76% 0.12 305); } .ds-footer-mark span:nth-child(4) { background:oklch(84% 0.20 125); } .ds-footer-mark span:nth-child(7) { background:oklch(62% 0.20 35); } .ds-footer-mark span:hover { transform:translateY(-6px) scale(1.08); } .ds-footer-mark i { width:8px; } .ds-footer-mark b { margin-left:6px; color:oklch(57% 0.24 260); }

narrative.overview: Content OS is experienced by a founder planning the week on a bright monitor, moving quickly between ideas, publishing, replies, and warm relationships. Precise product evidence sits inside an illustrated world of handoffs, routes, operating panels, and a paper airplane that represents shipped work.
keyCharacteristics: A compact first viewport with illustration, promise, CTA, and product proof.
The lowercase content os. wordmark with a cobalt period and paper-airplane favicon.
An illustrated command center that shows the complete operating relay.
Three distinct poster scenes for voice, distribution, and leads.
Sentence-case display typography with heavy scale and tight tracking.
Hard construction outlines paired with one soft product shadow.
Desktop choreography that reduces to stable mobile compositions.

rules.name: The Color Has a Job Rule
rules.body: Cobalt publishes, vermilion signals, lime learns, and lilac converses. Never scatter these colors as decoration.

rules.name: The White Stage Rule
rules.body: The hero and distribution scene preserve enough neutral space for the characters and product proof to remain readable.

rules.name: The Ink Field Exception
rules.body: Full-bleed Soft Ink is reserved for the leads poster and footer contrast moments. It is not a default dark theme.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Headlines and interface labels use natural capitalization. All-caps is forbidden outside unavoidable platform or acronym names.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Hanken Grotesk carries both brand and product. Do not add serif or monospace type to manufacture personality.

rules.name: The Tight-at-Scale Rule
rules.body: Tracking becomes more negative as headlines grow, but body copy remains normally spaced and readable.

rules.name: The Two Shadow Languages Rule
rules.body: Software floats softly; illustrated evidence lifts with a hard offset. Never combine both treatments on one object.

rules.name: The Flat-Until-Lifted Rule
rules.body: Shadows identify the dominant proof or a physically lifted poster piece. They are never ambient fog.

dos: Do make the entire loop visible through real states and handoffs.
Do use one dominant visual idea per viewport.
Do let the illustrated command center prove product depth before feature explanation.
Do assign every saturated color its documented workflow role.
Do use sentence-case headlines with Hanken Grotesk, bold weight, and tight tracking.
Do vary composition across voice, distribution, and leads.
Do remove characters and the large dashboard on narrow screens when they compete with understanding.
Do preserve WCAG 2.2 AA contrast, semantic landmarks, 44px touch targets, keyboard focus, and complete reduced-motion states.
donts: Don't resemble generic AI SaaS marketing, a Linear clone, a caption generator, or a writer's portfolio.
Don't use blue or purple gradient atmospheres, floating glow orbs, decorative glass-card grids, vague automation claims, dense enterprise martech language, or fabricated social proof.
Don't use a generic analytics dashboard, traffic chart, or interchangeable stat-card row as product proof.
Don't repeat identical feature-card grids or give every section the same background and structure.
Don't copy Notion's illustration style, monochrome identity, page structure, or components.
Don't use beige graph paper, long empty MacBook scrolls, sparse edge sketches, typewriters, pens, or loose manuscript pages.
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe accents, nested cards, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't use pure black as Soft Ink or introduce unassigned accent colors.
